title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky

cpu: AMD A4-4300M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
Must disable logo and opening videos in the configuration settings before launch or will render a black screen on startup and story start.

If you have frame rate issues try disabling DX11 and DX10 dlls and using gamemode. If you still have frame rate drops and lags set the frame rate limiter to 30 FPS and/or lower the in game resolution. But if you can get the settings correct for your computer you can get native performance like you were running it in windows.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky

notes: Had to disable logo and opening movies, the game works wonders otherwise.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky

notes: Running `protontricks 251150 directshow` allowed the videos to work. The game otherwise works fine out of the box. In game videos: 1. Startup logo. 2. Intro movie shortly after starting a new game. 3. End game movies.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky

notes:
The game works fine except for videos. In game videos: 1. Startup logo. 2. Intro movie shortly after starting a new game. 3. End game movies.

Running `protontricks 251150 directshow` allowed the logo video to work. Installing K-Lite Codec Pack Basic into the prefix allowed the intro movie to work.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky

notes: to make videos work install directshow and LAVFilters to the game's prefix (ignore if LAVFilters fails to register something)
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky
